subject: [CPS] Add Configurable Paramaters to OOM
commit_message:
[CPS] Add Configurable Paramaters to OOM

Add configurable parameters to OOM for Module Sync
Watchdog Process

Issue-ID: CPS-875
Change-Id: I13601cffca22ca19c70614553afbdf86584caf6f
Signed-off-by: DylanB95EST <dylan.byrne@est.tech>
